testcase.name: supportsAdminUserCrud

Hibernate: drop table if exists notification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists report cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists staff cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists student cascade Hibernate: create table admin_user ( active boolean not null, admin_id bigint generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255) not null, position varchar(255) not null, primary key (admin_id) ) Hibernate: create table document_request ( expected_processing_time integer not null check (expected_processing_time>=1), queue_position integer not null check (queue_position>=1), request_date date not null, assigned_staff_id bigint, document_id bigint not null, request_id bigint generated by default as identity, student_id bigint not null, request_type varchar(255) not null, status enum ('COMPLETED','IN_REVIEW','PENDING','PROCESSING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (request_id) ) Hibernate: create table document_requirement ( document_id bigint generated by default as identity, document_details varchar(1000) not null, document_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (document_id) ) Hibernate: create table notification ( date_sent timestamp(6) not null, notification_id bigint generated by default as identity, request_id bigint not null, message varchar(1000) not null, notification_type enum ('ASSIGNMENT','OVERDUE','PING','STATUS_UPDATE','SUBMIT') not null, primary key (notification_id) ) Hibernate: create table report ( generated_date date not null, report_id bigint generated by default as identity, request_id bigint not null, staff_id bigint not null, remarks varchar(1000), report_name varchar(255) not null, report_type enum ('QUEUE_STATUS','REQUEST_SUMMARY','STAFF_WORKLOAD') not null, primary key (report_id) ) Hibernate: create table staff ( staff_id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, firstname varchar(255) not null, lastname varchar(255) not null, position varchar(255) not null, primary key (staff_id) ) Hibernate: create table student ( year_level integer not null, user_id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (user_id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\denzel\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.15.11\byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
